title: 2026-06-08 주간 요약
headline: arm64 KVM / nested-virtualization maintainers and downstreams enabling FEAT_NV2/

sections.heading: 회귀·보안 신호
sections.body:
**KVM: arm64: Add kvm_for_each_vncr_tlb() helper**

Introduces a kvm_for_each_vncr_tlb() iterator on top of kvm_for_each_vcpu() that checks both that a vCPU's pseudo-TLB is allocated and that the VNCR TLB is vali

영향: On NV (nested virt) hosts, VNCR TLB invalidation runs from MMU notifiers or guest TLBI and can race a vCPU that has not been onlined yet (no pseudo-TLB allocate

> VNCR TLB invalidation occurs from MMU notifiers or TLBI instructions, and either can race against a vcpu not being onlined yet (no pseudo-TLB allocated).

[원문 확인](https://lore.kernel.org/linux-arm-kernel/20260607175745.297793-1-maz@kernel.org/)

**KVM: riscv: Check hugetlb block mappings against memslot bounds**

Passes the target mapping size into fault_supports_gstage_huge_mapping() so the hugetlb path applies the same memslot-containment and GPA/HVA offset-alignment c

영향: Until now RISC-V KVM used the hugetlb VMA size directly as the G-stage mapping size; an unaligned memslot could install a PMD/PUD G-stage block covering memory 

> an unaligned memslot could make KVM install a PMD or PUD sized G-stage block that covers memory outside the slot or maps the wrong host pages.

[원문 확인](https://lore.kernel.org/linux-riscv/CAK9=C2XGRgz+3c2Rf8bj8tPtAiCpHXrsm2sNC1b7qHt-5p6PZQ@mail.gmail.com/)

sections.heading: 핵심 변경
sections.body:
**riscv: panic if IRQ handler stacks cannot be allocated**

Makes init_irq_stacks() and init_irq_scs() call panic() when arch_alloc_vmap_stack or scs_alloc return NULL, instead of proceeding with a NULL stack pointer.

영향: Turns a silent allocation failure (which would later fault unpredictably when an IRQ uses the missing stack) into an immediate, diagnosable panic at boot/init —

> init_irq_stacks() and init_irq_scs() may fail when arch_alloc_vmap_stack or scs_alloc return NULL, call panic() in this case.

[원문 확인](https://lore.kernel.org/linux-riscv/773527c2-760d-60c6-23c3-0f1f60cc3fea@kernel.org/)

**RISC-V: KVM: Add Svadu/Zicfiss/Zicfilp FWFT support**

An 8-patch series (v3) exposing Svadu (hardware A/D bit updating) and the Zicfiss/Zicfilp control-flow-integrity extensions to KVM guests via the SBI FWFT inter

영향: Brings RISC-V shadow-stack/landing-pad CFI and hardware A/D updating into virtualized guests, expanding the riscv KVM one-reg UAPI and FWFT surface. Relevant to

> adding the Svadu/Zicfiss/Zicfilp FWFT for the RISC-V KVM. And this patchset already passes the KVM unit test. Follow the patchset (Which is queued for v7.2)

[원문 확인](https://lore.kernel.org/linux-riscv/20260607081105.993908-1-inochiama@gmail.com/)

sections.heading: 기타
sections.body: 국부 드라이버/플랫폼 패치는 본문에서 제외했습니다. 자기 영역 키워드로 lore.kernel.org에서 직접 검색하세요.

confidence.note: 리서치 dossier 의 출처를 근거로 작성했습니다. 중요한 판단 전에는 링크된 원문을 확인하세요.
